series_metadata.series_description: Records of each meeting including names of members present, all business matters considered and action taken, including exhibits.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years, then transfer to State Archives for their possible retention or destruction. Transitory material including but not limited to audio/digital recordings, working notes, etc. will be destroyed once the official minutes have been approved and signed by the Board''s President and Secretary. ; Microform: Retain permanently in office., Paper: Archives ; Microform: Permanent
